items.description: Rishabh Pant opens up about his expectations, leadership style and what he plans for the Lucknow Super Giants this IPL.

items.description: A documentary-style look at how the Indian Premier League transformed cricket culture, talent discovery, and viewership globally.

items.description: From Punjab U-19 to the Gujarat Titans captain — Shubman Gill's incredible journey to the top of Indian cricket.

items.title: The Bravest
items.description: A gripping action thriller about elite firefighters who risk everything to save lives in the most dangerous conditions.

items.description: A young apprentice must battle against witches, beasts and sorcerers when the seventh son of a seventh son is recruited.

items.title: The Society
items.description: When a group of teenagers are mysteriously transported to a perfect replica of their town without any adults, they must figure out how to survive.

items.description: Based on the true story of the dramatic hijacking of Indian Airlines Flight 814 during the 1971 war.

items.title: Tara
items.description: A dramatic family saga set in rural Rajasthan, following the journey of a determined young woman named Tara.

items.description: A historical epic about a brave warrior who defies all odds to protect his kingdom from powerful invaders.

items.description: A historical epic about a brave warrior who defies all odds to protect his kingdom from powerful foreign invaders.

items.description: A hilarious comedy of errors as a man tries to manage his multiple relationships while keeping them all a secret.

items.description: Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde return for another adventure in the incredible animal city of Zootopia.

items.description: The beloved robot cat Doraemon and Nobita embark on a brand new magical adventure beyond time and space.

items.description: Thor enlists the help of Valkyrie, Korg and ex-girlfriend Jane Foster to fight Gorr the God Butcher.

items.description: India's most thrilling dating reality show where singles find their ideal match or face brutal elimination.
